calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

The Court has problem with when there is a Will, the estate is distributed by intestacy. Mr. Der stated that the Will is not self proving and that the end result is the same. He further stated that the daughter has not responded and that he was leaving it up to Mr. Accornero to file the certified Letters. The matter was taken under sumbmission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
